query: DELETE r1 FROM notionRetryQueue r1 INNER JOIN notionRetryQueue r2 ON r1.writeType = r2.writeType AND COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(r1.payload, '$.orgSlug'), '') = COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(r2.payload, '$.orgSlug'), '') AND COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(r1.payload, '$.taskId'), '') = COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(r2.payload, '$.taskId'), '') AND COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(r1.payload, '$.testKey'), '') = COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(r2.payload, '$.testKey'), '') AND COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(r1.payload, '$.questionId'), '') = COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(r2.payload, '$.questionId'), '') AND r1.id < r2.id WHERE r1.status = 'pending' AND r2.status = 'pending';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27oV2HNhPbfG1Yy.f6bc15b848e8 --database hgGEXRHUCG7apwzJRKH7LF --execute DELETE r1 FROM notionRetryQueue r1 INNER JOIN notionRetryQueue r2 ON r1.writeType = r2.writeType AND COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(r1.payload, '$.orgSlug'), '') = COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(r2.payload, '$.orgSlug'), '') AND COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(r1.payload, '$.taskId'), '') = COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(r2.payload, '$.taskId'), '') AND COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(r1.payload, '$.testKey'), '') = COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(r2.payload, '$.testKey'), '') AND COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(r1.payload, '$.questionId'), '') = COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(r2.payload, '$.questionId'), '') AND r1.id < r2.id WHERE r1.status = 'pending' AND r2.status = 'pending';
